links.source_location: §1 (closest competitor: RAG chatbot over journalism, but closed-corpus, no KG)
AC-2 substring prefilter backed by NLI entailment gate
§6.1 EI-2 → EI-8 corroboration uses independence definition
AC-2 (both are anti-hallucination layers, substring is prefilter to NLI)
SEC-2 ↔ SEC-3 (both ensure authenticity at intake)
SEC-4 OIDC replaces persistent sops keys
§1 AKN / §2 Popolo (both model legislative documents/speeches; AKN=document-structure, Popolo=political entities)
§1 (both are EU legal-resource identifier schemes; ELI=legislation, ECLI=caselaw)
Epic 8 executes PD-3 gate from Epic 2 infra
